content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 1, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 1, 2026, focused on enhancing agent autonomy and orchestrator capabilities. Key achievements include the deployment of a Claude-Code-style coding workbench, the introduction of keyless `WEB_FETCH` for non-Anthropic models, and significant infrastructure hardening for cloud-agent provisioning and CI/CD stability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Orchestrator & Coding Workbench**
*   Launched a live, Claude-Code-style coding workbench supporting streaming, diffs, and SSE, optimized for the `opencode + Cerebras` backend ([#8095](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8095)).
*   Improved error handling in the orchestrator by preserving JSON-RPC `error.data` for better diagnostic visibility ([#8098](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8098)).

**Agent Runtime & Features**
*   Implemented a keyless `WEB_FETCH` action, enabling non-Anthropic models to perform live information retrieval inline ([#8097](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8097)).
*   Added configuration support for the `run-node` entry filename via `ELIZA_ENTRY_FILE` ([#8126](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8126)).
*   Refined plugin loading by moving `plugin-google` and `plugin-lifeops` to optional status to ensure default image boot stability ([#8105](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8105)).

**Cloud & Infrastructure Hardening**
*   Fixed native Cloud agent sandbox routing and startup issues ([#8104](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8104)).
*   Streamlined CI/CD workflows, including environment-specific provisioning for the worker daemon and improved submodule guardrails ([#8114](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8114), [#8102](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8102)).
*   Enabled whitelabeling for Windows installers by making naming brand-agnostic ([#8103](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8103)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Core & Security:** [#8140](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8140), [#8135](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8135), [#8129](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8129), [#8123](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8123), [#8113](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8113), [#8106](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8106).
*   **Orchestrator & Cloud:** [#8139](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8139), [#8133](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8133), [#8128](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8128), [#8112](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8112), [#8109](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8109), [#8107](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8107), [#8145](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8145).
*   **Performance & Misc:** [#8138](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8138), [#8137](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8137), [#8134](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8134), [#8132](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8132), [#8131](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8131), [#8130](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8130), [#8119](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8119), [#8118](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8118), [#8111](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8111), [#8110](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8110), [#8141](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8141).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Build & Runtime Stability**
*   Resolved build failures in `develop` and fixed regressions in agent image booting ([#8099](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8099), [#8100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8100)).
*   Addressed issues with PGlite lock staleness and wallet label sanitization ([#8092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8092), [#8091](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8091)).

**Orchestrator & Planner Logic**
*   Fixed JSON-RPC error reporting and corrected false-positive freshness gates in the orchestrator ([#8101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8101), [#8127](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8127)).
*   Addressed meta-narration issues in the planner's `REPLY` action ([#7960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7960)).

## NEW ISSUES

**Dependency & Build Chain Challenges**
*   Reported issues regarding `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` in bundled environments and build failures for private workspace packages on fresh clones ([#8142](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8142), [#8143](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8143)).

**Live-Info & Orchestrator UI**
*   Identified gaps in the v5 planner action surface for `WEB_FETCH` and UI parity issues in the orchestrator workbench ([#8108](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8108), [#8136](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8136)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8122](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8122) (Inline WEB_FETCH planner routing):** Discussed the regression of live-info on non-Anthropic runtimes. The community reached a consensus to abandon the forced planner-routing approach in favor of the sub-agent path, while keeping the keyless `WEB_FETCH` action available. The issue was validated and closed as fixed on `develop`.
